philosophy: Finite time, infinite options — that's what makes life beautiful. You get to choose your own unique set of things to compound on. Meaning flows where investment goes. Wasting time is the real loss.

coreTraits.health: I feel solid and capable in my body. Training is automatic — not a negotiation, just the next thing I do. Every meal is a compounding input: protein first, clean fuel, no junk defaults. What I eat today is building the body I'll have in 6 months. I sleep deeply and wake sharp. Discomfort is familiar and welcome.
coreTraits.wealth: I wake up with clarity about what matters today. I sit down and the work flows — calm, focused, unhurried. I build things that compound. I ship, not because I have to, but because creating is who I am. The 9-5 funds the mission; the deep work IS the mission.
coreTraits.love: I feel warmth toward the people in my life. Reaching out is natural, not effortful. I'm curious about them, not performing for them. Hard conversations feel like investment, not threat. I lead with honesty and let people see me.
coreTraits.self: My mind is quiet. Stillness is my default state, not something I have to chase. Urges pass through without landing — I notice them and they dissolve. I'm curious, grounded, proactive. Mornings belong to me. Every clean day compounds into a person I respect.

identityScript.nonNegotiables: Wim Hof every morning. Movement and gym. Meditation. Clean eating. Deep work. No substances. No video games. Quietness, reflection, and stillness.
identityScript.physicalPresence: Kind to others. Confident. Assertive. But genuine.
identityScript.socialFilter: Kind, happy people who are self-motivated. Share interests. Genuine. Trustworthy. Unselfish.
identityScript.decisionStyle: Assertive. Uses learned tools to manage stress — Advaita, Wim Hof, cold showers, walks. Acts despite the discomfort.

antiVision.health: Skips gym on any excuse. Eats junk. Overweight. No discipline. Numbs with food instead of facing discomfort.
antiVision.wealth: Coasts at the 9-5. Never ships. Consumes instead of creates. Wastes evenings on League and poker instead of building.
antiVision.love: Isolates. Avoids hard conversations. Lets relationships decay. Too comfortable to initiate. Takes people for granted.
antiVision.self: Smokes weed. Watches porn. Plays League all night. Gambles on poker apps. Reactive. Hates himself. Zero self-respect.

domains.label: Health
domains.actual: Hit planned gym sessions, run protein-first meals, prioritize sleep quality and emotional regulation during stress.
domains.becoming: 200 lbs with an athletic Olympic lifter build. Lean, strong, disciplined. Training is non-negotiable.
habits: Train daily — no excuses for emotion or timing

domains.label: Wealth
domains.actual: Prioritize AI fluency and minimum two deep-work blocks/day on high-leverage output. Keep compounding systems steady and tie major spending decisions to explicit long-term intent.
domains.becoming: 100k/year providing premium value across AI, meditation, personal growth, and addiction recovery. Financial tracker app and productivity/self-improvement vision app as primary vehicles.
habits: Build and ship on financial tracker app
Build and ship on productivity/vision app
Study and apply AI to domains I love

domains.label: Love
domains.actual: Reduce isolation with deliberate weekly social contact. Pursue honest relationship clarity conversations.
domains.becoming:
Romantic: a partner who meets universal fundamentals and my personal fundamentals. Built through investment, not discovered through optimization.
Social: active local community, friends who push each other forward.
habits: Be grateful for parents, family, partner, friends — daily
Send one thoughtful text to partner every day
Check in with partner 2-3x/week with prepared topics
Smile to parents and ask about them
Initiate one social plan per week

universal: Making space for each other's flaws

domains.label: Self
domains.actual: Keep daily reflection/journaling and meditation active; protect sobriety streaks and interrupt urges immediately. Replace at least one zero-sum leisure loop with a positive-sum activity.
domains.becoming: Calm, resilient, self-aware. Mind protected at all costs. Morning priorities before others. Focused. Grounded. Proactive. 3 years clean from all substances. Consistently curious — reading, exploring, never stagnant.
habits: Protect mornings — my priorities before others

steps: Open morning report — sit with identity script, feel into the state
habitStacks: After warm water → Wim Hof immediately
After Wim Hof → open morning report before anything else
After deep work → set tomorrow before anything else

books: As a Man Thinketh — James Allen
The Perfume of Silence — Francis Lucille
nutritionRules: Predictable grocery list — low decision friction
No junk defaults — if it's not helping, it's hurting

triggerReplacements.replacement: Walk first, or short meditation outside
